content:
create narrative blips that are randomized, potentially write to meter—have x number of words per line broken down into boxes (each box assigned a variable number of words that would randomize on reload)

add priest character, posting on holy days, scripture, prophecies, etc

rewriting memories

combine all the instance of the myth throughout time, this allows for bridging between worlds and then stealing characters from other authors

nanotechnology synthesizing nature, carrying vines

the ai is recreating people from the world before, from captured memories, images, social network data—recreated consciousness
peoples old home movies become repurposed.

downloading consciousness

a computerized sexual act is not simple: it is obtained from the use of different programs at the same time. the drawings are purely representative

returning to the idea of worshipping things

dactylic hexameter (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dactylic_hexameter)
